sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90480" key="protelesmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτελ-εσματικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n90480.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προτέλεσμα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
